event.description: An uneventful year — the colony settles into routine

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.41)
              (water 0.88)
              (pop 7)
              (crisis 0.16))
          (if (> crisis 0.5)
            (list "ration" (* food 0.8) (* water 0.7))
            (if (> food 1.5)
              (list "expand" (+ pop 2) food)
              (list "maintain" pop food))))

colonist_diaries.entry:
Year 35 — Nova (water)
Mood: hopeful. Event: An uneventful year — the colony settles into routine.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.
